title: Linear — The system for product development
description: Purpose-built for planning and building products with AI agents.

sections.title: The system for product development.
sections.lede: Purpose-built for planning and building products with AI agents. Linear is shaped by the practices the highest-throughput product teams converged on independently.

background.alt: Editorial photograph illustrating product development workflow.

sections.text: Forge-static approximation of linear.app authored from SSR-extractable headings + descriptions. Pixel-rep rotation target per PlausiDen-Forge #222. Not affiliated with Linear; the substrate uses Linear as a reference shape for the editorial_purity_gate's dense-info-panel audit (Linear is one of the few mainstream SaaS sites that already ships an editorial-density landing rather than the SaaS-trope hero+features grid).

sections.body: Designed for workflows shared by humans and agents. From drafting PRDs to pushing PRs. Reduces noise and restores momentum to help teams ship with high velocity and focus.

items.value: Make product faster — turn conversations into actionable issues.
items.hint: Customer feedback is routed, labeled, and prioritized for the right team. No issue-tracker triage queue eating engineering attention.

items.value: Define the work, end to end.
items.hint: Plan and navigate from idea to launch. Align teams via product initiatives, strategic roadmaps, and clear up-to-date PRDs.
Build and deploy AI agents that work alongside your team. Complex tasks together or delegate entire issues end-to-end.
Understand code changes at a glance with structural diffs for human and agent output. Review, discuss, and merge — all within Linear.
Project updates, analytics, and dashboards surface what needs your attention. The signal-to-noise ratio is the product.

sections.text: Built for the future. Available today.

Linear ships with a deliberately small surface area: issues, projects, cycles, and the agent layer that operates on them. Every feature is shaped by the Linear Method — the principles document that determines what doesn't ship as much as what does.

sections.title: Open the live Linear site.
